signal.name: trailing_universe_heat
signal.def: rolling fraction of last K=25 fleet fills with realized peak>=+20, computed from trips strictly before decision (no leakage)

proposed_rule.action: raise runner-tranche TP2 from +12 to +18..+20; keep TP1 +6 and stop unchanged; cold tape (<0.20) keeps +12
proposed_rule.never: blanket; never raise TP1 (loses, -1.33 on hot trips)

note: analysis-only; requires AxiS approval + live pre-flight before any routing
